summary: Comprehensive test suite spanning both unit tests (New-EnvironmentMatrix.Tests.ps1 with 14 Pester tests) and integration tests (run-tests.ps1 with workflow validation and act execution). Covers all major requirements: Cartesian product generation, include/exclude rules, max-parallel/fail-fast settings, size validation via max-combinations, JSON input, and GitHub Actions workflow compatibility. Well-organized with clear Describe blocks and descriptive test names. Good use of fixtures (TestDrive for JSON file test, temporary git repo for act). Validates workflow structure, actionlint compliance, and real execution. Gaps: unit tests lack required explanatory comments on testing approach; missing edge case coverage (multiple include+exclude combined, negative/zero parameter validation, exact boundary testing at max-combinations limit, invalid JSON/ConfigPath errors, special characters, product exactly at size limit); no test for calling function with neither Config nor ConfigPath. Integration tests appropriately validate execution through act and specific output values. Would catch most regressions in core functionality and workflow integration.
